journal_entry.reason: Record receipt of security deposit from tenant. The $25,000 security deposit is a refundable liability, not revenue, as it will be returned to the tenant at lease end (subject to any deductions for damages or unpaid rent). The monthly rent of $10,000 will be recognized as revenue in future periods as the tenant occupies the space.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez leased space to a tenant and received a $25,000 security deposit upon lease signing. Under IFRS, a security deposit is not revenue - it is a liability representing the lessor's obligation to return the deposit to the tenant at the end of the lease term (subject to any legitimate deductions for damages or unpaid rent). The transaction only records the receipt of the deposit; the monthly rent of $10,000 will be recognized as rental income in future periods as the tenant uses the space. No tax is mentioned in the transaction text, so no tax lines are included.
